title: Smoky Floral Moroccan Shallot Salad
description: A fresh, raw-friendly salad featuring thinly sliced shallots, dried rose petals, and a smoky, creamy yogurt-tahini dressing that highlights fragrant Moroccan spices.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt, tahini, lemon juice, smoked paprika, cumin, cinnamon, olive oil, and a pinch of sea salt until smooth. Set aside.
Toast walnuts in a dry skillet over medium heat for 2–3 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove from heat and let cool.
Thinly slice the shallot with a sharp knife or mandoline, then toss with a pinch of sea salt. Let sit 5 minutes to mellow the sharpness, then drain any excess liquid.
In a large bowl, combine the salad greens, sliced shallot, fresh basil, dried rose petals, and toasted walnuts.
Drizzle the prepared dressing over the salad, gently toss to coat evenly, and let rest for 5 minutes to meld flavors.
Serve immediately on a chilled plate, garnishing with extra basil leaves and a light dusting of smoked paprika for visual flair.
